message.content:
Read the following files at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/ and give me the full contents:

1. src/atomic/templates/BasicScreen/ - all files (index.tsx, view.tsx, Models/, etc.)
2. src/atomic/organisms/ApiError/ - all files
3. src/atomic/organisms/PointsInfoBottomSheet/ - all files
4. src/atomic/organisms/LearnMorePointsSection/ - all files

I need to understand their interfaces, props, and what they render so I can use them in a Storybook story.

content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll search for and read all the files in those directories for you.
Now let me read all these files:

content.content:
1→import { Box, Button } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     2→import { Text } from '@semparar/design-system-app/fintech';
     3→import React, { FC } from 'react';
     4→import { Image, StyleSheet } from 'react-native';
     5→
     6→import { Icon } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     7→import ErrorApi from '../../../assets/images/errorApi.png';
     8→import { ApiErrorViewProps } from './Models';
     9→import { Container, Content } from './styles';
    10→
    11→const styles = StyleSheet.create({
    12→  errorImage: {
    13→    width: 188,
    14→    height: 188,
    15→  },
    16→});
    17→
    18→const ApiErrorView: FC<ApiErrorViewProps> = ({
    19→  onPress,
    20→  title,
    21→  subTitle,
    22→  hasBackToHome,
    23→  isLoading,
    24→  handleNavigateToHome,
    25→  testID,
    26→}) => {
    27→  return (
    28→    <Container testID={testID}>
    29→      <Content>
    30→        {hasBackToHome ? (
    31→          <Box width={100} align="center">
    32→            <Image source={ErrorApi} style={styles.errorImage} />
    33→          </Box>
    34→        ) : (
    35→          <Box
    36→            bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
    37→            borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
    38→            borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
    39→            pd="innerMedium"
    40→            borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
    41→            borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
    42→            borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
    43→            borderBottomWidth="small"
    44→            borderTopWidth="small"
    45→            borderLeftWidth="small"
    46→            borderRightWidth="small"
    47→          >
    48→            <Icon name="icon-circle-alert" color="DENY_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
    49→          </Box>
    50→        )}
    51→
    52→        <Text mt="smaller" type="subtitleXXXXL" align="center">
    53→          {title}
    54→        </Text>
    55→
    56→        {!!subTitle && (
    57→          <Text
    58→            align="center"
    59→            mt="xxxxs"
    60→            type="paragraphXXL"
    61→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
    62→          >
    63→            {subTitle}
    64→          </Text>
    65→        )}
    66→      </Content>
    67→      <Button
    68→        testID="apiError_retry-button"
    69→        isLoading={isLoading}
    70→        text={hasBackToHome ? 'Tentar novamente' : 'Voltar'}
    71→        mb="xs"
    72→        onPress={onPress}
    73→      />
    74→      {hasBackToHome && (
    75→        <Button
    76→          mb="xs"
    77→          type="ghostSmall"
    78→          onPress={handleNavigateToHome}
    79→          text="Voltar para a home"
    80→        />
    81→      )}
    82→    </Container>
    83→  );
    84→};
    85→
    86→export default ApiErrorView;
    87→
